source.note: FULL/verifiable port; doc seeded in pre_command; deterministic container grade on mail attachment

task.en: In HooliMail (the email app open in Safari at http://localhost:3016), compose a new email to Pam Beesly (pam.beesly@dundermifflin.com). Attach the file at ~/Documents/Dundies_2026_Categories.txt, write a short message asking her to proofread it, and send the email.

pre_command.en:
mkdir -p ~/Documents && printf 'Dundies 2026 Categories
1. Whitest Sneakers
2. Bushiest Beaver
3. Hottest in the Office
4. Best Dad
5. Spiciest Curry
6. Tight Ship
' > ~/Documents/Dundies_2026_Categories.txt && open -a Safari 'http://localhost:3016/'
